name: clawdtributor
tagline: Triages OpenClaw contributor PRs/issues by cross-referencing a local Discord archive with live GitHub state into a risk-tagged summary.
verdict: Well-specified triage workflow with concrete SQL/gh commands, an explicit output format with worked examples, and safeguards on bulk mutations. Main risk is hygiene: discrawl, sqlite3, perl and gh are all invoked with no upfront requirements/availability check, plus no exclusion guidance or versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' scoping; only lists composable sibling skills, not exclusions.
discrawl, sqlite3, gh, and perl are invoked directly with no requirements section or availability check.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the file.
